# cloudfoundry_service_instance (List Resource)

This list resource allows you to discover all service instances the caller has access to, optionally filtered by organization or space.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# This feature requires Terraform v1.14.0 or later (Stable as of 2026)
# List resources must be defined in .tfquery.hcl files.

# Generic template for a list block
list "cloudfoundry_service_instance" "<label_name>" {
  # (Required) Provider instance to use
  provider = provider_name

  config {
    # Provider specific filters
  }
}

# List block to discover all service instances.
list "cloudfoundry_service_instance" "all_service_instances" {
  provider = cloudfoundry
}

# List block to discover all service instances and include the resource data in the output.
list "cloudfoundry_service_instance" "all_service_instances_with_data" {
  provider         = cloudfoundry
  include_resource = true
}

# List block to discover all service instances in a specific organization.
list "cloudfoundry_service_instance" "org_service_instances" {
  provider = cloudfoundry
  config {
    org = "b4da43cd-2055-4d4d-ae6e-4066ce34a563"
  }
}

# List block to discover all service instances in a specific space and include the resource data in the output.
list "cloudfoundry_service_instance" "org_service_instances_with_data" {
  provider         = cloudfoundry
  include_resource = true
  config {
    org = "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `org` (String) The GUID of the organization to filter service instances by.
- `space` (String) The GUID of the space to filter service instances by.
